use.flag: Use the NSS latest certdata.txt (for the most up-to-date certificate changes, consumer apps)
Use the NSS ESR certdata.txt (distro preference, enterprise and server environments)
Use the NSS live snapshot of certdata.txt (oiledmachine-overlay preference) for nearly fastest changes/revocations to certs and trust bits.
Use the NSS live certdata.txt for the fastest changes/revocations for certs and trust bits.
